videos.summary_source_text:

Relive the moment with the Ducks broadcast, ESPN, and Canadian English and French feeds.

videos.title: Dobes Makes Buzzer-Beating Save! 🇨🇿🚨
videos.summary_source_text:
Dobes Makes Buzzer-Beating Save! 🇨🇿🚨 With just seconds left in the second period, Jake Guentzel looks set to score, but Jakub Dobeš reacts quickly and dives and stretches out to stop the puck with his stick right at the buzzer! A huge last-second save for the Montreal Canadiens to preserve a 2-1 lead heading into the third period in Game 4 of the first-round playoff series.

The video explains how to use Hermes AI to automate SEO content creation and grow traffic from zero to 1,000 clicks per day by generating and publishing posts on a daily schedule. It shows how Hermes can connect to tools like WordPress (via login and API token) or Netlify (via access token), with Netlify positioned as faster and easier to connect and better designed. The creator demonstrates setting up credentials, providing Netlify documentation to Hermes, and using Claude Code to resolve a publishing workflow question, then having Hermes analyze brand voice and formatting from existing examples and create a scheduled cron task. Hermes selects new topics, writes markdown posts with internal links and callouts, builds and deploys the site to Netlify, and reports what was published, while recommending quality control and feedback so Hermes can self-learn and improve.

videos.title: Avalanche Complete Sweep of LA Kings. Will Have All Week to Rest Up for Wild or Stars
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Complete Sweep of LA Kings. Will Have All Week to Rest Up for Wild or Stars Colorado Avalanche sweep the Los Angeles Kings as Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, and Scott Wedgewood shine—can the Avs sustain this playoff dominance through a long postseason run?

Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s commanding performance, spotlighting crucial goals from MacKinnon and Toews, defensive excellence, and Wedgewood’s steady presence in net. Discussion zeroes in on Artturi Lehkonen’s relentless forechecking, Makar’s highlight-reel skills, and the impact of lineup depth with key contributions from players like Nick Blankenberg. The crew explores the Kings’ struggles, the psychological advantage of earning extra rest, and Anze Kopitar’s possible final moments with LA. Plus, analysis of potential second-round opponents and whether extra days off will be a blessing or a curse for Colorado’s Cup hopes.

Is this Avalanche squad peaking at the perfect time, or will the layoff slow their momentum?

videos.title: Hagel The Hero & Michkov Scratched ft Marco D'Amico, Russ Joy & Andrew Raycroft | MCH
videos.summary_source_text:
Hagel The Hero & Michkov Scratched ft Marco D'Amico, Russ Joy & Andrew Raycroft | MCH Season 3 rolls on with another loaded edition of Morning Cuppa Hockey as Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen are joined by a trio of elite hockey minds to break down everything happening across the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

First up, Marco D'Amico drops by to break down another penalty-filled affair between the Lightning and Canadiens as Tampa evens the series with a huge comeback win. 

Then, Russ Joy joins the show discuss how much trouble the Flyers could be in after failing to close out the series vs Pittsburgh on home ice, and the big story of Matvei Michkov looking to be a healthy scratch in Game 5.

Finally, former Bruins' Goaltender Andrew Raycroft drops by to talk Alex Lyon, Sabres fanbase, and how Boston can climb their way back into the series vs Buffalo. 

Don’t miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026 Check out all the best shots from final-round foursomes at the 2026 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, featuring Matt Fitzpatrick, Alex Fitzpatrick, Davis Thompson and Austin Eckroat, among others.

It’s once again time to team up at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, the PGA TOUR’s only team event, held at TPC Louisiana. Now in its ninth year as a pairs format, the event mixes Four-ball and Foursomes across four days, delivering a unique test and plenty of volatility as duos battle for momentum and FedExCup points with the Cadillac Championship on the horizon. Fresh off his playoff win at the RBC Heritage, Matt Fitzpatrick teams up with brother Alex Fitzpatrick, forming one of the most in-form pairings in the field.  A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans.

videos.title: READ IT & SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Swept the Ottawa Senators Following their Game 4 Win
videos.summary_source_text:
READ IT & SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Swept the Ottawa Senators Following their Game 4 Win The Carolina Hurricanes swept the Ottawa Senators with a 4-2 win in Game 4 in Ottawa on Saturday night. What stood out in a chaotic game that saw the Hurricanes advance to Round 2? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach starts the show by sharing his thoughts on Game 4 as a whole. From the goals, the saves, to the chaos, and so much more. It was a game of attrition, but in the end, the Hurricanes swept the Senators with their 4-2 win. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the series as a whole, especially with how the Hurricanes performed in all four games. What stood out the most, leading to the series sweep? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on who the Hurricanes could face in Round 1 between either the Pittsburgh Penguins or the Philadelphia Flyers. With them playing Game 5 on Monday night, who could take that game? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: McDavid vs. MacKinnon Crossunder Edition
videos.summary_source_text:
McDavid vs. MacKinnon Crossunder Edition In this video we take a quick look at Nathan MacKinnon and Connor McDavid’s crossunders. 

The cadence and size of the cross can vary depending on your style, and it’s important to feel comfortable with both smaller and larger steps. The rocker is also crucial, and you want to focus on landing at the heel with good shin angle, and then pushing off into a rocker that lands at the toe. 

It’s important to stay loose throughout the movement, with flexible ankles, loose hips, and relaxed shoulders. At Train 2.0, we focus on the underfoot and making sure we have a solid rocker, as it gives more power and mechanical leverage. Don’t overthink the technique, just focus on feeling comfortable and keeping that knee over your toe. In this video we take a quick look at Nathan MacKinnon and Connor McDavid’s crossunders. 

The cadence and size of the cross can vary depending on your style, and it’s important to feel comfortable with both smaller and larger steps. The rocker is also crucial, and you want to focus on landing at the heel with good shin angle, and then pushing off into a rocker that lands at the toe. 

It’s important to stay loose throughout the movement, with flexible ankles, loose hips, and relaxed shoulders. At Train 2.0, we focus on the underfoot and making sure we have a solid rocker, as it gives more power and mechanical leverage. Don’t overthink the technique, just focus on feeling comfortable and keeping that knee over your toe.

In this video, you’ll learn why dark spots form, how melanocytes respond to stress, inflammation, blood sugar spikes, and oxidative damage, and why most treatments fail to deliver lasting results. In this video, I break down exactly how far you should stand from the golf ball, using a simple tip I learned from a caddie that instantly improved my setup. If you’ve ever been told you’re standing too close (or too far), this is the fix you’ve been looking for.

This simple golf setup adjustment can help you:
Hit cleaner, more consistent shots
Improve your ball striking
Eliminate common swing mistakes
Build a repeatable, confident setup

OpenAI Is Burning $12B a Quarter — Can They Beat Google? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
OpenAI vs Google Gemini — who's actually winning the AI race in 2026? I went deep into Alphabet's 10-K, OpenAI's leaked financials, and every regulatory filing I could find, and the truth completely flipped my view.

One company is burning $12 BILLION in a single quarter. The other made more last year than most countries' entire GDP. In this breakdown, I cover the real financials, the tech stack, distribution moats, regulatory risks, and the talent war nobody's talking about — so you can see which company is actually positioned to win.

videos.title: What ACTUALLY Gets You Lean (Stop Messing This Up!)
videos.summary_source_text:
What ACTUALLY Gets You Lean (Stop Messing This Up!) If nutrition keeps tripping you up… if you feel like you can train hard but can’t stay consistent with your diet… then this is the video you need to watch.

Because the truth is — you haven’t failed your diet.

Your diet has failed you.

Get the Flex Factor Meal Plan - https://athleanx.com

And I’m going to show you exactly why.

In this video, I’m breaking down one of the biggest lies in fitness — the idea that you need to follow a rigid, perfect, all-or-nothing meal plan to get lean, build muscle, and stay that way. That’s exactly why most people never make it. They fall off before they ever give themselves a real chance to succeed.

Here’s the reality:
Almost 80% of your ability to stick to a nutrition plan comes down to what happens in the FIRST 10 DAYS.

And most people never even make it there.

Why?
Because they think they have to be perfect. Perfect food choices.Perfect timing.Perfect portions. And the moment something doesn’t go exactly as planned… they quit. That’s the mistake.

Because when you actually understand how nutrition works — and how flexible it really is — everything changes.

In this video, I show you:
 • Why nutrition—not training—is the biggest driver of fat loss
 • How to set your protein intake correctly based on your goal (fat loss, muscle gain, or maintenance)
 • Why most diet plans fail due to perceived rigidity—not actual requirements
 • How to use a simple plate division method to build meals that work anywhere, anytime
 • Why swapping foods like rice, pasta, potatoes, or vegetables doesn’t matter nearly as much as you think
 • How to adjust portion sizes to account for calorie differences in protein sources like chicken, steak, and salmon
 • Why fibrous carbs are almost calorically irrelevant—and stressing over them is killing your consistency
 • How to structure your eating around your real life schedule (not someone else’s unrealistic plan)
 • The truth about intermittent fasting, meal timing, and eating frequency
 • And most importantly… how to create a plan you can actually stick to long enough to make it automatic.

Because that’s the goal.

Not perfection.
Consistency.
Once you understand this, you stop starting over.

You stop “falling off.” You stop thinking you need a new diet every 2 weeks.
And you finally build something that lasts.

I’ve done this for over 17 years — not just for myself, but for elite athletes, actors, and everyday people who needed real, sustainable results.

And the ones who succeed?
They’re not the most disciplined.
They’re the ones who stop chasing perfection… and start building consistency.

If you can get through the first 10 days — you’re closer than you think. Most people quit on the 1-yard line. Don’t be one of them. If you’re ready to stop overcomplicating your nutrition and finally take control of it, this video will show you how.

And if you want a system that adapts to YOU — your schedule, your preferences, your goals — I built something called the Flex Factor Meal Plan to do exactly that.

But even if you never use it…
Everything you need to succeed is already in this video.
Watch it. 

Apply it. And give yourself the chance to finally get this right.

If you know someone struggling with their nutrition, share this with them.
Subscribe for more science-based training and nutrition videos that actually work. And for step-by-step programs and tools, head to ATHLEANX.com. videos.title: Why Are All The BEST Golfers Using This Putter?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Are All The BEST Golfers Using This Putter? Rick sits down to deep dive why the TaylorMade Spider has become the most used putter on tour. From its beginnings in 2008 to dominating the Masters, Scottie's insane win streak, and why guys like Rory and Tommy Fleetwood made the switch, we break down the story behind the putter that's quietly changed professional golf

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Watch Any NHL Playoff Game Tonight. You'll Never See This
videos.summary_source_text:
Watch Any NHL Playoff Game Tonight. You'll Never See This I want you to try something tonight which is to watch an NHL game and count how many times you see a player do a traditional forward start from a dead stop. Full sprint from a standstill the thing every power skating coach works on with their players.

You'll almost never see it but what you will see are players gliding in a corkscrew, crossing, punch turning, pivoting, transitioning and then accelerating out of those movements typically with crossovers. 

That's how hockey is actually played because you're almost never standing still. You're almost always in motion when you need to accelerate. So why are we training acceleration from a standstill?

Here's a piece of advice which is train your crossovers as an acceleration tool. Instead of lining up on the goal line and sprinting forward, practice gliding at half speed and then hitting two or three quick crosses to accelerate. That's the best way to train that in game movement pattern and will translate better than some of this traditional skating drills from a standstill. 

---

videos.title: Vi mätte räckvidden på BMW, Audi & Zeekr – resultatet är pinsamt
videos.summary_source_text:
Vi mätte räckvidden på BMW, Audi & Zeekr – resultatet är pinsamt Hur kan det skilja 19 mil i räckvidd mellan tre av marknadens hetaste elbilar? I det här testet ställer jag BMW, Audi och utmanaren Zeekr mot varandra i en stenhård granskning av räckvidd, teknik och faktiskt värde för pengarna. Vi har hört löftena om snabb laddning och långa räckvidder enligt WLTP – men vad händer när vi kör bilarna sida vid sida i verkliga svenska förhållanden?

Resultatet är inget annat än en chock. Att en bil i premiumsegmentet kan leverera 19 mil extra räckvidd jämfört med sina konkurrenter kan förändra allt hela för dig som ska välja tjänstebil eller privatleasing 2026.

BMW iX3 har hyllats som den bästa el-suven, men räcker det när Audi sänker priset på nya Q6 e-tron och kinesiska Zeekr 7X dundrar in med maximal utrustning och extrem laddning? Jag tar tempen på de tre hetaste utmanarna just nu.

Köp Vredesteindäck till riktigt bra pris!
https://www.vredestein.se/giftcard

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad

🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se

06:20 Kvalitetsanalys – Tysk ingenjörskonst mot kinesisk lyxinredning.

26:30 Ekonomi & Kalkyl – Tjänstebilsanalys, försäkring och andrahandsvärde.
29:15 Summering – Vilken bil är den tekniska segraren?

videos.title: The #1 Nutrient Deficiency in High Blood Pressure (Hypertension)
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Nutrient Deficiency in High Blood Pressure (Hypertension) Learn about one of the top causes of hypertension and how one important mineral can help. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/3Qu8lPu

0:00 Introduction: Essential hypertension
0:32 What is high blood pressure?
1:11 What causes hypertension? 
2:29 Potassium and heart health
4:04 Best sources of potassium
5:08 How to lower blood pressure naturally

In this video, we’re going to take a look at hypertension. Ninety percent of all hypertension is considered essential hypertension. This means the cause is unknown. Anti-hypertensive medication is one of the most prescribed medicines in the world.

Normal blood pressure is 120/80. Research suggests a strong relationship between potassium deficiency and high blood pressure. Many people are deficient in potassium because the requirements are so high—4700 mg daily.

You need about half as much sodium as potassium, but many people consume three times as much sodium as potassium!

Potassium directly controls the tone of the vascular system. This directly affects blood pressure. Potassium also supports the endothelial layer of the arteries and helps improve insulin resistance. 

Potassium supplements often only contain 99 mg of potassium, which is incredibly low considering how much potassium you actually need.

You can get potassium from salad, but you must consume around 7 to 10 cups daily. This also provides magnesium. The combination of potassium and magnesium can help reduce high blood pressure.

Diets high in carbs and sugar cause you to lose potassium. Adrenaline and cortisol deplete potassium as well.

To support healthy blood pressure levels, try increasing your salad intake. You can also look for a high-quality electrolyte powder that's high in potassium.

videos.title: Hur väljer vi grepp?
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Hur väljer vi grepp? När vi väljer grepp ska vi försöka skapa ett grepp som ger maximal styrka och kontroll vid bollträff. #golfswing #golf #golftips 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Recept:
Recept:

Wokad Pak Choi & Tofu i vitlökssås med sesam och ingefära
Krispig tofu, saftig pak choi och en smakrik vitlökssås – enkelt, snabbt och galet gott! Perfekt vardagsmat som smakar som något från din favoritrestaurang. Servera med ris och njut!

25 min
4p
Ingredienser:
Huvudrätt:
400 g fast tofu
1 lök, skivad
2 st pak choi
2 msk rapsolja
3 vitlöksklyftor, finhackade
2 tsk ingefära, finhackad
2 msk ljus sojasås
1 msk mörk sojasås
1 msk ostronsås (eller hoisin)
1 tsk sesamolja
1/2dl vatten
ev 1 tsk majsstärkelse + 2 msk vatten (till redning)

Topping:
1 msk rostade sesamfrön
2 salladslökar, finhackade
Serveras med:
Nykokt jasminris

Gör så här:
Förbered tofun: Torka av tofun med hushållspapper och skär den i bitar, ca 3x3 cm.
Hetta upp 1 msk olja i en stekpanna på medelhög värme och stek tofun gyllenbrun på båda sidor, ca 3-4 minuter per sida. Lägg åt sidan.
Förbered pak choi: Skär pak choi i mindre bitar, Skiva löken.
Hetta upp resterande olja i en wok eller stekpanna, Tillsätt lök och stek 1 minut ha sedan i pak choi och stek ytterligare i 1 min Gå i med vitlök och ingefära . Fräs i ca 1-2min.
Lägg tillbaka tofun i pannan och tillsätt ljus sojasås, mörk sojasås, ostronsås, vatten och sesamolja.
Rör ut majsstärkelse i vatten och häll i pannan. Rör om och låt såsen tjockna lätt.
Ta av från värmen och strö över rostade sesamfrön och salladslök. Servera direkt med nykokt jasminris

Hetta upp 1 msk olja i en stekpanna på medelhög värme och stek tofun gyllenbrun på båda sidor, ca 3-4 minuter per sida. Lägg åt sidan.
Förbered pak choi: Skär pak choi i mindre bitar, Skiva löken.
Hetta upp resterande olja i en wok eller stekpanna, Tillsätt lök och stek 1 minut ha sedan i pak choi och stek ytterligare i 1 min Gå i med vitlök och ingefära . Fräs i ca 1-2min.
Lägg tillbaka tofun i pannan och tillsätt ljus sojasås, mörk sojasås, ostronsås, vatten och sesamolja.
Rör ut majsstärkelse i vatten och häll i pannan. Rör om och låt såsen tjockna lätt.
Ta av från värmen och strö över rostade sesamfrön och salladslök. Servera direkt med nykokt jasminris


______________________________

videos.title: Why our grip matters. Be strong at impact…
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
Why our grip matters. Be strong at impact… We all need to test and find the best grip for our way of hitting the ball. When we find it, do not change it. #golfgear #golfswing #golftips 

0:00 Intro to why our grip matters 

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane

25.4: Wallstedt slams the door with AMAZING 43-save performance! 🇸🇪⭐ Jesper Wallstedt simply continues to sparkle in net, this time stopping 43 of 45 shots he faces in a Stars onslaught to help his Wild go on to earn the 3-2 overtime victory and tie the series up at 2 games apiece! Wallstedt's heroics in the crease earn him both 2nd star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors!

In this video, we break down Adelman defending Denver’s effort, Jokic calling his play “average,” and what really stood out from inside the Nuggets room after a crushing playoff defeat. videos.title: Jokic, Nuggets Come Up Small as Ant, Divincenzo Exit Series | DNVR Nuggets Postgame Show
videos.summary_source_text:
Jokic, Nuggets Come Up Small as Ant, Divincenzo Exit Series | DNVR Nuggets Postgame Show The Nuggets are on the brink of elimination in the first round despite a slew of injuries for the Minnesota Timberwolves. Dante DiVencenzo tore his achilles early in the game and then Anthony Edwards also left the game with a knee injury. Despite the injuries the Nuggets were not able to get the win in Minnesota and are down in the series 3-1 and cannot afford to lose again. Is there a bounce back or is the season over? Where can Jokic & the Nuggets go from here? Adam Mares, Harrison Wind, Duvalier Johnson, and Eric Wedum (D-Line Co.) come to you LIVE from the DNVR bar to break down everything you need to know in this postgame edition of the DNVR Nuggets Podcast!

videos.title: 🇸🇪 Rakell Sparks Penguins in Crucial Game 4 Win 🔥
videos.summary_source_text:
🇸🇪 Rakell Sparks Penguins in Crucial Game 4 Win 🔥 Rickard Rakell makes a huge impact for the Pittsburgh Penguins in Game 4, pressuring goalie Dan Vladar behind the net before prying the puck loose and diving to score for a 2-0 lead in the second period. He also adds an assist on a key sequence involving Sidney Crosby and Kris Letang, helping set up the decisive goal that gives Pittsburgh a two-goal cushion. The Penguins hold on for a 3-2 win over the Philadelphia Flyers, but still trail the series 3-1 in the first round.

videos.title: Silovs' STELLAR game keeps Penguins alive! 🇱🇻🐧
videos.summary_source_text:
Silovs' STELLAR game keeps Penguins alive! 🇱🇻🐧 Arturs Silovs gets the call to keep the Penguins' season alive, and he does not disappoint! The Latvian netminder is a brick wall, stopping 28 of 30 shots he faces to help lead Pittsburgh to a crucial series-extending 4-2 victory.

videos.title: Boldly Scores OT Winner, Lifts Wild To 3-2 Victory In Game 4, Ties Series 2-2 | DLLS STARS POSTGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Boldly Scores OT Winner, Lifts Wild To 3-2 Victory In Game 4, Ties Series 2-2 | DLLS STARS POSTGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

Matt Boldy scores the game-winning goal with 29 seconds left in the first overtime, as the Minnesota Wild captured Game 4 by a 3-2 score on Saturday at Grand Casino Arena. The Stars-Wild first round series is now tied at 2-2, with Game 5 scheduled for Tuesday, April 28th at American Airlines Center in Dallas (7 p.m. CT). Jason Robertson opened the scoring with a first period power play goal. Brock Faber tied it later in the first on a point shot that deflected in off the left leg of Miro Heiskanen. Heiskanen put Dallas back in front late in the second period, the team’s second power play goal of the game. Marcus Foligno tied the game with 5:20 left in regulation and then Boldy got the game-winner on a tip-play at the crease. videos.title: Fitzpatrick brothers set tournament record with 57 | Round 3 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Fitzpatrick brothers set tournament record with 57 | Round 3 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026 In the third round of the 2026 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, Matt and Alex Fitzpatrick set a new four-ball record, shooting 15-under 57 to get to 30-under overall. The brothers take a four-shot lead into Sunday's final-round foursomes. 

It’s once again time to team up at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, the PGA TOUR’s only team event, held at TPC Louisiana. Now in its ninth year as a pairs format, the event mixes Four-ball and Foursomes across four days, delivering a unique test and plenty of volatility as duos battle for momentum and FedExCup points with the Cadillac Championship on the horizon. Fresh off his playoff win at the RBC Heritage, Matt Fitzpatrick teams up with brother Alex Fitzpatrick, forming one of the most in-form pairings in the field.  A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans.

A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans. 

SUBSCRIBE TO THE PGA TOUR: https://www.youtube.com/@UCKwGZZMrhNYKzucCtTPY2Nw

videos.title: Why Players Should Train Upperbody Posture Mechanics
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Players Should Train Upperbody Posture Mechanics The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Stars Look To Take A Stranglehold On Series With Wild In Today’s Game 4 | DLLS STARS PREGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Stars Look To Take A Stranglehold On Series With Wild In Today’s Game 4 | DLLS STARS PREGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

The Dallas Stars and the Minnesota Wild had two days to rest and recover from their gruelling double overtime battle in Game 3, where the Stars won 4-3 on a Wyatt Johnston power play goal to take a 2-1 series lead. Wednesday’s four-hour marathon game started at 8:51 p.m. CT and ended at 12:53 a.m., technically Thursday morning. Today’s Game 4 starts at a much more reasonable 4:30 p.m. CT. On today’s DLLS Stars Pregame Show, we will discuss all the big storylines, we will take a look at the expected lineup and hear from both coaches. Expected starting goaltenders: Jake Oettinger (DAL) vs. Jesper Wallstedt (MIN).

videos.summary_source_text:
CHICAGO WOLVES TAKEOVER! Spiros Anastas Joins to Preview the Wolves' 2026 Calder Cup Playoffs It's a Saturday Special episode of Locked on Hurricanes as Chicago Wolves head coach Spiros Anastas joins the show for the second time, this time in his new role. The guys will be discussing the season overall and the Calder Cup Playoffs. It's a Chicago Wolves Takeover show! On the Saturday, Chicago Wolves Takeover Special, Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach is joined by Anastas as the guys talk about his journey from being an assistant coach to interim to head coach. After taking over and going 25-14-5-6 in the last 50 games, how does Anastas feel about where the team is overall heading into the playoffs? What did he learn over the course of the season to prepare for the postseason? Secondly, the guys preview the Central Division Semifinal matchup against the Texas Stars. What is something to keep an eye on as the Wolves look to win the best-of-5 series in Anastas' first playoff run as the head coach? Finally, the guys discuss which Wolves players to watch in the playoffs. After seeing some players play well in the AHL and fit in well with the Hurricanes, how are the vibes heading into the postseason? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Feeling Your Putter Wobble? Do This #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Feeling Your Putter Wobble? Do This #golfswing #golftips Does your putter feel wobbly or unsteady on the way back? The problem isn’t your stroke — it’s trying to control it too much. By loosening your grip pressure and allowing a quicker  backstroke, you’ll actually create a smoother, more natural roll. As Dr. Bob Rotella says: “You gain control when you give up control.” Try this next time you’re on the greens and watch your putting improve.

videos.title: Rub Banana Peel on Your Face — Watch This
videos.summary_source_text:
Rub Banana Peel on Your Face — Watch This Banana peels for wrinkles are going viral, with people claiming smoother skin and even Botox-like effects, but before you try it, there’s something important you need to understand about what’s really happening to your skin. In this video, I show you a simple test you can do right now that reveals why your skin may appear tighter or smoother almost instantly, and it has nothing to do with actually removing wrinkles. You’ll learn how surface hydration, light reflection, and increased circulation can temporarily change the way your skin looks, and why true wrinkle formation happens deeper in the skin where collagen and elastin are affected over time. I also walk you through simple, effective strategies you can use immediately to support healthier skin, improve hydration, and enhance your natural glow without chasing misleading trends. Once you understand how your skin really works, you can make smarter choices that actually benefit you long term.

*********************************

videos.title: GPT 5.5 vs Claude Opus 4.7: Which AI Model Actually Wins in 2026?
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT 5.5 vs Claude Opus 4.7: Which AI Model Actually Wins in 2026? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
GPT-5.5 vs Claude Opus 4.7 — which one is actually worth your money in 2026? I spent weeks running identical prompts through both frontier models, and the results don't match the marketing pages. One of these models quietly burns through tokens at almost 3x the rate of the other — and it's probably not the one you'd expect.

In this deep dive, I break down exactly where GPT-5.5 wins, where Claude Opus 4.7 pulls ahead, and which one fits YOUR specific workflow — whether you're coding, doing research, building AI agents, or running multimodal tasks.

🔍 WHAT WE COVER:
✅ Architecture & training philosophy — OpenAI's chain-of-thought vs Anthropic's hybrid reasoning
✅ Million-token context windows compared (and the hidden 400K cap in Codex)
✅ Vision & multimodal — why Opus 4.7 sees images in 4x higher resolution
✅ Reasoning controls: reasoning_effort, xhigh mode, and Claude's task budgets
✅ Coding benchmarks: Terminal-Bench 2.0, SWE-Bench Pro — who actually wins?
✅ The token efficiency trap — why "cheaper per token" can mean a bigger bill
✅ Independent benchmarks (Vals.ai) vs marketing benchmarks
✅ Safety, guardrails, and the chain-of-thought leakage bug
✅ Real recommendation: when to pick which (and when to use both)

videos.title: ChatGPT 5.5 Backlash Explained: 5 Reasons Users Are Angry
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT 5.5 Backlash Explained: 5 Reasons Users Are Angry Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
GPT-5.5 launched April 23, 2026, and within 48 hours users were furious. 
In this video, I break down the 5 biggest complaints flooding Reddit, 
Twitter, and the OpenAI forums — and the simple workarounds that actually 
fix most of them.

OpenAI calls GPT-5.5 their "smartest and most intuitive" model ever. But 
independent testers are reporting an 86% hallucination rate when the 
model is uncertain, doubled API pricing, patronizing tone issues, and 
serious lag problems. So is it really an upgrade — or did OpenAI ship 
too fast?

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 The GPT-5.5 problem nobody is talking about
01:08 Official Claims & Context
02:10 Complaint #1: Hallucinations & Accuracy
03:48 Complaint #2: Tone, Bias & Guardrails
05:28 Complaint #3: Speed & Interface Issues
06:46 Complaint #4: Pricing & Access
08:21 Complaint #5: Corporate Trust
09:20 Counterpoints & Workarounds That Actually Work
11:24 Expert Take & Timeline Recap
12:33 Final Verdict & Takeaways

🔧 QUICK FIXES MENTIONED
✅ Custom Instructions tweak to kill the patronizing tone
✅ How to break prompts to reduce hallucinations
✅ When to use Instant mode vs Thinking mode
✅ Why GPT-5.4 is still the smarter choice for daily use

📌 RELATED VIDEOS
https://youtu.be/n1DERzBVNhg
https://youtu.be/5iQcpXSpv2c
https://youtu.be/DU25TeipfCM

videos.title: 3 Things That Auston Matthews Does to Separate Himself From The Pack
videos.summary_source_text:
3 Things That Auston Matthews Does to Separate Himself From The Pack Three things that make Auston Matthews’ shot mechanics different from other NHL first-liners:

1️⃣ Soft ankles → Matthews articulates through flexion, eversion, inversion, pronation/ supination. This gives his edges more bite and reduces tension.

2️⃣ Diverse footwork patterns → He can shoot off any edge, with or without a weight shift. That adaptability makes him dangerous in unpredictable situations.

3️⃣ Back pocket rocket → Top hand finishes in his “back pocket,” creating a quick, powerful, efficient release.

Want to add these mechanics to your game? Inside Train 2.0+, you’ll get the full Slingshot Shooting System- a step-by-step program that shows you how to:

🔺 Unlock effortless whip with the floating elbow.
🔺 Shoot off any edge like Matthews.
🔺 Add deception and speed to your release. Three things that make Auston Matthews’ shot mechanics different from other NHL first-liners:

videos.title: Stars vs Wild Chaos 😳 Wild Insider Breaks It Down
videos.summary_source_text:
Stars vs Wild Chaos 😳 Wild Insider Breaks It Down The DLLS Stars crew is joined by Minnesota Wild beat writer Jess Myers to break down a thrilling and intense Stars vs. Wild playoff series.

Myers provides insight into the electric atmosphere in Minnesota, the impact of special teams, and how the absence of key players like Mats Zuccarello is affecting the Wild’s power play. The conversation also dives into Kirill Kaprizov’s quiet stretch, lineup adjustments, and the challenges Minnesota faces at both 5-on-5 and on the man advantage.

The discussion touches on the rising physicality, controversial moments, and the growing tension between both fan bases, highlighting how emotions and discipline could ultimately decide the series.

With both teams trading momentum and neither side backing down, Myers shares his outlook on how the series could unfold — and why it has all the makings of a seven-game battle. videos.summary_source_text:
It Took Me 25 Years To Figure This Out...Do This Before Every Shot Struggling to hit your driver straight or strike your irons better no matter how much you practice? You're not alone — and the fix might be far simpler than you think. In this golf lesson, Danny Maude reveals a powerful shift in focus that helped one of his students transform his golf swing and hit the ball longer and straighter with ease.  

Discover how to get out of your head and start having the right conversation in your golf swing — one that puts you back in control of the clubhead and your shots.

✅ Learn how to hit driver straight  
✅ Strike your irons better and more consistently  
✅ Add effortless power to your swing  
✅ Understand simple golf swing basics that really work  

This video is packed with simple golf tips and drills you can take straight to the range. Whether you’re new to the game or looking to refine your golf technique, this golf lesson from Danny Maude will help you feel the golf club properly and start enjoying your golf again.

On YouTube and my personal website (www.dannymaude.com) I will bring you the most up to date training, training that is getting tangible results for my clients right now. Wherever you are I’ve created a place here you can learn, share your ideas, ask questions and get all the support you need to enjoy this great game.

videos.title: Struggling with Early Extension? #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Struggling with Early Extension? #golfswing #golftips Early extension makes it difficult to create space and return the club to the ball consistently. Practicing from slightly closer to the ball with a simple station encourages the hips to move back and stay out of the way. If you early extend from this setup, contact becomes almost impossible — which helps train the correct movement quickly.
If early extension or poor contact is holding your game back, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear priorities and drills to build space and consistency in your swing.
Subscribe to Me and My Golf for more simple golf tips. Early extension makes it difficult to create space and return the club to the ball consistently. videos.title: 7 “Healthy” Foods Quietly Destroying Your Body
videos.summary_source_text:
7 “Healthy” Foods Quietly Destroying Your Body You might think these foods are healthy, but they’re actually some of the worst foods for your metabolism. Discover the 7 foods that slow your metabolism, stifle weight loss, and contribute to insulin resistance.  

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4sOpQaB

0:00 Introduction: Why your metabolism is slow
1:19 7 foods that slow metabolism
3:02 Seed oils dangers
4:45 Oat milk
6:20 Agave nectar
7:33 Kombucha tea
9:49 Starch and hidden sugar foods 

Keep watching for more ways to boost your metabolism and burn fat: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/JhRqDqbyJ9o
▶️ https://youtu.be/rEWNmcBFHOc
▶️ https://youtu.be/evxMkIHpRcI

A slow metabolism means there are available calories in your body, but your cells can’t properly use them. This is also known as metabolic dysfunction. The worst foods for the metabolism are often considered healthy, but consuming them could be the reason you’re struggling to lose weight. 

Fruit juice is often considered a healthy choice, but it’s actually about 55% fructose. Fructose can only be metabolized by the liver, so consuming it in high amounts can lead to liver stress, fatty liver, increased belly fat, and metabolic problems. 

Seed oils are often labeled as “heart-healthy,” but are highly processed, genetically modified, and typically contain herbicides. Up to 30% of daily calories in the average diet come from seed oils, which can contribute to inflammation and metabolic dysfunction.

Other foods like oat milk and agave nectar spike blood sugar and insulin, disrupting metabolic health, preventing weight loss, and slowing your metabolism over time.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Disclaimer: 
Dr. Eric Berg received his Doctor of Chiropractic degree from Palmer College of Chiropractic in 1988. His use of “doctor” or “Dr.” in relation to himself solely refers to that degree. Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. This video is for general informational purposes only. It should not be used to self-diagnose, and it is not a substitute for a medical exam, cure, treatment, diagnosis, prescription, or recommendation. It does not create a doctor-patient relationship between Dr. Berg and you. You should not make any change in your health regimen or diet before first consulting a physician and obtaining a medical exam, diagnosis, and recommendation. Always seek the advice of a physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

#health #keto #ketodiet #weightloss #ketolifestyle #intermittentfasting #lowcarb

The NEW Mizuno JPX one drivers 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Från Göteborg till Trondheim
videos.summary_source_text:
Från Göteborg till Trondheim Från Göteborg till Trondheim
Pilgrimsleden Göta älv

Under medeltiden var Sankt Olav - Olof den helige - Nordens mest kända helgon. Ända fram till 1500-talet vallfärdade pilgrimer till Trondheim, där den norske helgonkungen Sankt Olavs reliker vilade i den mäktiga Nidaroskatedralen.

Femhundra år efter reformationen är det åter möjligt att vandra som pilgrim till Nidaros. Vid Masthuggskyrkan börjar Pilgrimsleden Göta älv, som förbinder dåtid med nutid genom en yttre och inre resa. Utsikter varvas med insikter.

Leden är en del av arvet efter Sankt Olav - Norges evige konge.

Välkommen att ta del av en tusenårig tradition som sträcker sig över nationsgränserna, med början mitt i Göteborg.

Besök platserna i filmen:

Masthuggskyrkan
https://www.svenskakyrkan.se/carl-johans-pastorat/masthugg/masthuggskyrkan

Skansen Kronan
https://www.sfv.se/vara-fastigheter/sverige/vastra-gotalands-lan/skansen-kronan-goteborg

videos.title: The #1 Best Vitamin for Arthritis (NOT VITAMIN D)
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Best Vitamin for Arthritis (NOT VITAMIN D) Discover the best natural and effective remedy for arthritis. This one surprised me! 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/3P1HNoj

0:00 Introduction: The best natural remedy for arthritis
0:35 What is arthritis?
0:40 Side effects of NSAIDs and steroids 
1:02 How this remedy works  
1:40 Signs of NAD deficiency 
2:48 The best vitamin for arthritis

In this video, we’re going to talk about a vitamin that can help relieve symptoms of arthritis. Arthritis involves inflammation, breakdown of cartilage, stiffness, and pain. 

People often take non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) to get rid of the pain associated with arthritis, but NSAIDs can cause gastrointestinal bleeding, ulcers, and kidney problems. Steroids for pain can destroy your joints and lower your immune system. 

This incredible remedy for arthritis is a precursor for NAD. NAD is a helper molecule that helps turn food into energy and is involved in over 400 different genes.

Signs of an NAD deficiency can include:
1. Low collagen repair
2. Inflammation
3. Fatigue
4. Muscle pain, muscle weakness, muscle loss
5. Metabolic diseases
6. Aging faster than normal
7. Lowered immune system

Niacinamide, a form of vitamin B3, is the best vitamin for arthritis. Try taking around 100 to 150 milligrams of niacinamide 3 to 6 times per day, depending on the severity of your arthritis. 

Ensure you’re consuming sufficient protein for niacinamide to help with your arthritis symptoms, and it’s also best to avoid alcohol. 

Tryptophan can also turn into vitamin B3, but the mechanism is not very efficient. Niacinamide is a non-toxic, effective, and affordable remedy for arthritis!

videos.title: UK | 24th April, Friday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 24th April, Friday - RIFT Presentation 24/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 24/04/26

videos.title: Ferrari v Lambo: who’s FASTEST in a DRAG RACE?
videos.summary_source_text:
Ferrari v Lambo: who’s FASTEST in a DRAG RACE? A huge thanks to everyone who helped us set up this drag race:

It’s time for the ULTIMATE Lamborghini v Ferrari drag race! 

We’ve got our hands on every iteration of the Lamborghini Huracan, and we’re putting them up against their equivalent competitors from Ferrari! 

It’s a truly Italian mid-mounted engine affair, but which will come out on top?! Let’s take a look through the competitors… 

Huracan LP 580-2
- 5.2-litre NA V10, 580hp, 540Nm, 1490kg, RWD

Huracan LP 610-4
- 5.2-litre NA V10, 610hp, 560Nm, 1522kg, AWD

Huracan STO
- 5.2-litre NA V10, 640hp, 565Nm, 1440kg, RWD

Huracan Performante
- 5.2-litre NA V10, 640hp, 600Nm, 1482kg, AWD

Ferrari 458 Speciale
- 4.5-litre NA V8, 605hp, 540Nm, 1395kg, RWD

Ferrari 488 Pista
- 3.9-litre TT V8, 720hp, 770Nm, 1485kg, RWD

Ferrari 296 GTS
- 3-litre TT V6 + Motor, 830hp, 740Nm, 1640kg, RWD

So which manufacturer will come out on top - Ferrari or Lamborghini? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE! A huge thanks to everyone who helped us set up this drag race:

videos.title: Rangers 30 y/o Rookie Peyton Gray Joins Us After MLB Debut | DLLS Rangers Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Rangers 30 y/o Rookie Peyton Gray Joins Us After MLB Debut | DLLS Rangers Podcast Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

 The Texas Rangers have a new rookie pitcher, but Peyton Gray isn’t a fresh-faced prospect. He’s a 30-year-old journeyman who never gave up the dream of pitching in the major leagues. It finally happened Thursday night as he tossed a perfect ninth inning to finished off the Rangers’ 6-1 win over the Pirates. He joined the show to discuss the experience. Also, the Rangers placed Wyatt Langford on the injured list Wednesday with a forearm strain. It’s the fifth time in his career of two-plus seasons that he’s landed on the IL. Is he injury prone?

videos.title: Carlsson records assist, BEAUTIFUL backhander in Game 3 win! 🇸🇪🚨
videos.summary_source_text:
Carlsson records assist, BEAUTIFUL backhander in Game 3 win! 🇸🇪🚨 Leo Carlsson leaves his mark on Game 3, netting an assist on Mikael Granlund's tally before scoring his second goal of the playoffs to extend the Ducks' lead to 5-2 early in the third period. The goal would become the game-winner, helping Anaheim secure a 2-1 lead in the series against Edmonton!

videos.title: Don’t Make This Backswing Mistake #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Don’t Make This Backswing Mistake #golfswing #golftips One of the most common backswing faults we see is the disconnected moveaway — when the arms push away from the body and lose sync early.
Once the arms separate, the swing loses structure, leading to poor contact and compensations later.
Visualize a line in front of your hands and feel them trace under that line to stay connected and synced with your body.
It’s a small start-of-swing fix that makes the entire motion smoother and impact more consistent.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. One of the most common backswing faults we see is the disconnected moveaway — when the arms push away from the body and lose sync early.
Once the arms separate, the swing loses structure, leading to poor contact and compensations later.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Round 2 foursomes at the 2026 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, featuring Matt and Alex Fitzpatrick, Tony Finau, Wyndham Clark and Ben Griffin, among others.

It’s once again time to team up at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, the PGA TOUR’s only team event, held at TPC Louisiana. Now in its ninth year as a pairs format, the event mixes Four-ball and Foursomes across four days, delivering a unique test and plenty of volatility as duos battle for momentum and FedExCup points with the Cadillac Championship on the horizon. Fresh off his playoff win at the RBC Heritage, Matt Fitzpatrick teams up with brother Alex Fitzpatrick, forming one of the most in-form pairings in the field.  A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans.

videos.title: How to Tape a Hockey Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Tape a Hockey Stick You just bought your first hockey stick, and you're about to head out for your first time on the ice—you want to show up ready. One of the simplest ways to prepare is learning how to properly tape your hockey stick. Taping the handle improves grip and comfort since your top hand acts as the steering wheel for stickhandling and control. Taping the blade serves a different purpose, helping improve puck feel, control, and shot accuracy while also protecting the blade from wear.

While every individual will develop their own style and routine, this video breaks the process down into a few easy steps so you can quickly learn how to tape both the handle and blade of your stick. We'll also cover helpful tips like tape color, wax, and alternative grip options so you can find the setup that feels best for your game.

videos.title: Fitzpatrick brothers FIRE alternate-shot 65 | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Fitzpatrick brothers FIRE alternate-shot 65 | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026 In the second round of the 2026 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, Matt and Alex Fitzpatrick shoot a 7-under 65 in Friday foursomes to get to 15-under par, positioning them at T2 heading into the weekend at TPC Louisiana.

It’s once again time to team up at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, the PGA TOUR’s only team event, held at TPC Louisiana. Now in its ninth year as a pairs format, the event mixes Four-ball and Foursomes across four days, delivering a unique test and plenty of volatility as duos battle for momentum and FedExCup points with the Cadillac Championship on the horizon. Fresh off his playoff win at the RBC Heritage, Matt Fitzpatrick teams up with brother Alex Fitzpatrick, forming one of the most in-form pairings in the field.  A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans.

videos.title: Are You Thinking… or Being Controlled?
videos.summary_source_text:
Are You Thinking… or Being Controlled? The quality of life is shaped by the quality of thoughts. When awareness is constantly pulled in different directions, it can feel like control has been lost. This is not by accident, modern life is designed to keep attention hooked and distracted. Practicing silence creates a way to step back, observe thoughts, and regain control instead of being driven by them.

videos.title: Eat a Sweet Potato — Watch What Happens to Your Gut, Blood, and Brain
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat a Sweet Potato — Watch What Happens to Your Gut, Blood, and Brain Most people eat sweet potatoes the same way, but one simple change can completely alter how your body responds to them. In this video, you’ll discover how cooling a cooked sweet potato transforms its starch structure through retrogradation, increasing resistant starch that feeds your gut microbiome instead of rapidly spiking your blood sugar. This powerful shift helps produce beneficial short-chain fatty acids like butyrate, strengthening your gut lining, reducing inflammation, and improving overall digestive health. You’ll also learn how this impacts your blood by stabilizing glucose and insulin levels, supporting better circulation, steady energy, and fewer cravings. Even more important, this process directly influences your brain through the gut-brain axis, helping improve focus, mood, and mental clarity. I’ll break down the key timing, how much to use, and simple ways to pair it with protein and healthy fats to maximize the benefit. This is about working with your physiology, not against it, so you can naturally support your gut, blood sugar, and brain health with one simple, powerful habit.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: GETTIN' STANKY WITH IT! Carolina Hurricanes Take 3-0 Series Lead After 2-1 Win
videos.summary_source_text:
GETTIN' STANKY WITH IT! Carolina Hurricanes Take 3-0 Series Lead After 2-1 Win The Carolina Hurricanes take a 3-0 series lead after defeating the Ottawa Senators 2-1 on Thursday night. The second line stood out again, and Frederik Andersen was a brick wall. What else stood out from the win to take a stranglehold on the series? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the story by sharing his thoughts on the second line continuing to be the best line not only in the series, but the playoffs as a whole. Logan Stnakoven scores, AGAIN. Taylor Hall with two assists and Jackson Blake scores his first of the series. They have a combined 13 points through three games. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Frederik Andersen once again being a brick wall, giving up one goal again with a .955 save percentage. How has he been one of the reasons for the Hurricanes' success so far? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on the Hurricanes so far this series, with them going into a do-or-die game on Saturday. They're one win away from a sweep. Can they get it done? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.summary_source_text:
Panic Mode for 3 Teams: Penguins, Senators & Kings on the Brink | DFO Rundown The NHL Playoffs are delivering absolute chaos—and some teams are already on life support.

In this episode, we break down the series that look all but over, including Ottawa, LA, and Pittsburgh staring down 0-3 deficits. Is there ANY chance of a comeback, or is it already “good night”?

We dive into:

-Carolina completely shutting down Ottawa’s offense
-Colorado overpowering the Kings despite close games
-Why Philadelphia might be the most dangerous team right now
-Goalie decisions that could change entire series
-Early picks for playoff MVP

Plus, we preview Montreal vs Tampa in what’s becoming one of the most intense matchups of the postseason as Utah hosts their first ever Playoff home game.

videos.title: GPT-5.5 vs Grok 4.3 Beta — 2M Context vs 82.7% Coding (The Honest Breakdown)
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.5 vs Grok 4.3 Beta — 2M Context vs 82.7% Coding (The Honest Breakdown) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
GPT-5.5 just launched… and Grok 4.3 Beta quietly entered the race.
One dominates benchmarks and developer workflows. The other pushes boundaries with 2M+ context, video input, and native document generation — but at a massive $300/month price tag.

So which one is actually worth it?

In this video, I break down the real differences between GPT-5.5 and Grok 4.3 Beta — not just hype, but what actually matters for developers, businesses, and creators.

We cover:

Coding and reasoning benchmarks (82.7% Terminal-Bench)
Architecture differences (Transformer vs Multi-Agent system)
Pricing breakdown (15x difference explained)
Safety, hallucinations, and transparency
Real-world use cases (coding vs long-context workflows)
Who should actually use each model

By the end, you’ll know exactly which AI model fits your workflow in 2026.

videos.title: 🔥 Yeast-free and sugar-free! Healthy white seeded bread in 5 minutes (+ baking)
videos.summary_source_text:
🔥 Yeast-free and sugar-free! Healthy white seeded bread in 5 minutes (+ baking) 🔥 Yeast-free and sugar-free! Healthy white seeded bread in 5 minutes (plus baking). Delicious, quick, and easy. I highly recommend it!

1 cup (240 ml) cream.
1 tsp baking soda.
1/2 cup (120 ml) yogurt.
7 oz (200 g) cottage cheese.
1 egg.
Salt.
3½ cups (350 g) all-purpose flour.
1/3 cup (50 g) sunflower seeds. 1/3 cup (50 g) pumpkin seeds.
Olive oil.
Mix all ingredients. Let rest for 15 minutes.
Olive oil.
Bake the bread in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for about 60 minutes.

🌿 Thank you for watching my healthy recipes.
I’m truly happy to have you here on the channel.

videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT 5.5 Is Here: I Tested What It Can Actually Do *Get the ChatGPT guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/h30v

I walk through how I test ChatGPT 5.5 with real tasks like coding, dashboards, websites, and agentic work.

I wanted to see if ChatGPT 5.5 is really better than past ChatGPT models and other AI tools like Claude. So I gave it simple prompts, messy data, coding tests, and larger business tasks to see what it could do.

I test ChatGPT 5.5 on website design, HTML code, a Sim City style game, an Earth dashboard, a business dashboard, and an Apple style product page. I also try a bigger prompt where ChatGPT 5.5 has to make a landing page, slideshow, and financial dashboard from one idea.

I share what worked well, where ChatGPT 5.5 had errors, and how it compares to Claude Opus for coding and knowledge work. I also show how the thinking mode changes the results and why extended thinking can help with harder coding tasks.

This is my first look at ChatGPT 5.5, so I keep it simple and focus on real use cases. If you use ChatGPT for work, coding, research, data, dashboards, websites, or AI agents, this should help you see what ChatGPT 5.5 can actually do.

videos.title: This Is Why Goalies Read Your Shot Like a Book
videos.summary_source_text:
This Is Why Goalies Read Your Shot Like a Book Built on top of the Downhill Skating “how to skate” fundamentals, the AM34 release is one of the keys to learning how to shoot like an NHL Player. This video will break down the three components of the snap shot that has made Auston Matthews one of the most prolific goal scorers in the NHL. This method of shooting has even started to pick up steam across the NHL with budding superstars like Cole Caufield and Connor Bedard adding it to their goal scoring arsenals.

If you’ve been trying to learn how to take a wrist shot or how to take a snap shot and have hit a wall with your hockey training this may be the missing link that you’ve been looking for. A lot hockey drills and skills training today misses the key mechanics that are fundamental to NHL player success and that’s what Train 2.0 aims to fix with our program.

videos.title: Sweep Watch, All Eyes on McDavid & Playoff Tensions Rising | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Sweep Watch, All Eyes on McDavid & Playoff Tensions Rising | Daily Faceoff Live The Carolina Hurricanes, Colorado Avalanche and Philadelphia Flyers are all on the verge of first-round sweeps, while pressure continues to mount across the rest of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

We start in Carolina, where the Ottawa Senators delivered a flat performance and their power play failed to deliver in a critical moment. How concerning has Brady Tkachuk’s quiet start been, and should the league look at the  Taylor Hall hit on Jake Sanderson?

Out West, the Los Angeles Kings managed to limit Nathan MacKinnon, but it still wasn’t enough against the depth of the Colorado Avalanche. Is this simply a mismatch?

McDavid has zero points in two games but how long with this slump last?

videos.summary_source_text:
Canes Lead 3-0 & Lyon Stands Tall ft Justin Williams, Ray Ferraro & Dan Rosen | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 rolls on with another loaded edition of Morning Cuppa Hockey as Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen are joined by a trio of elite hockey minds to break down everything happening across the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

First up, Justin Williams stops by to discuss the Carolina Hurricanes’ dominant 3-0 series lead over the Ottawa Senators, what’s clicking for Carolina, and whether there’s any path back for Ottawa.

Then, Ray Ferraro joins the show to break down the Buffalo Sabres bouncing back in a big way in Game 3 against the Boston Bruins, taking a 2-1 series lead and shifting the momentum in what’s turning into a tightly contested matchup.

Finally, NHL.com’s Dan Rosen drops by to dive into the Dallas Stars vs. Minnesota Wild series, analyzing key storylines, standout performers, and what could ultimately decide the series.

videos.title: I can’t Believe They Let Me Play Here! (My Dream Golf Course)
videos.summary_source_text:
I can’t Believe They Let Me Play Here! (My Dream Golf Course) LONDON MARATHON DONATION LINK: https://www.justgiving.com/page/rick-shiels-marathon

Not many people in the world have ever been allowed to film at this place… and somehow, we did it.

Welcome to Leopard Creek Country Club — one of the most exclusive, breathtaking, and intimidating golf courses on the planet. Set right on the edge of the Kruger National Park, this is golf like you’ve never seen it before.

We’re talking wild animals roaming just metres away, insane views on every hole, and a golf course that demands your absolute best.

After playing Augusta National Golf Club, I didn’t think many places could come close… but this? This is right up there.

In this video, I take on Leopard Creek to see if I can handle the pressure, the conditions, and one of the most unique golfing environments in the world.

Expect:

* Jaw dropping scenery
* Risk and reward golf at its finest
* A course that punishes every mistake
* And a few surprises along the way…

If you love golf, travel, and bucket list experiences… this is one you don’t want to miss.

Let me know in the comments — is this the most beautiful course in the world?

Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)
My new limited edition merch is now available — thanks so much for the incredible support!
UK viewers: https://uk.rickshiels.com
US viewers: https://us.rickshiels.com

MORE FROM ME
🎙 Podcast — The Rick Shiels Golf Show
https://www.youtube.com/@RickShielsGolfShow
🏌️‍♂️Golf equipment reviews — H.I.T Golf
Honest, independent testing of the latest drivers, irons, putters, golf balls and tech.
